scenarios.name: ballots are secret until the ceremony is revealed, and each member gets one pick per category

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_awards_night__ceremonies (id, title, status, created_by_id, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES ('cer1', 'Family Awards', 'voting', ?, 'A', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_awards_night__categories (id, ceremony_id, title, nominee_type, created_by_id, created_at) VALUES ('cat1', 'cer1', 'Funniest', 'text', ?, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_awards_night__ballots (id, ceremony_id, category_id, member_id, member_name, nominee_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('b_a', 'cer1', 'cat1', ?, 'A', 'Uncle Joe', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_awards_night__ballots (id, ceremony_id, category_id, member_id, member_name, nominee_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('b_a2', 'cer1', 'cat1', ?, 'A', 'Aunt May', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_awards_night__ballots (id, ceremony_id, category_id, member_id, member_name, nominee_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('b_b', 'cer1', 'cat1', ?, 'B', 'Grandpa', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z')
SELECT id, nominee_name FROM app_awards_night__ballots WHERE ceremony_id = ?
SELECT id FROM app_awards_night__ballots WHERE ceremony_id = ?
UPDATE app_awards_night__ceremonies SET status = 'revealed', revealed_at = '2026-01-03T00:00:00Z' WHERE id = 'cer1'
SELECT id FROM app_awards_night__ballots WHERE ceremony_id = ?

scenarios.name: once revealed, the ceremony is frozen: no new ballots and existing picks cannot be changed

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_awards_night__ceremonies (id, title, status, created_by_id, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES ('cer1', 'Superlatives', 'voting', ?, 'A', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_awards_night__categories (id, ceremony_id, title, nominee_type, created_by_id, created_at) VALUES ('cat1', 'cer1', 'Most Likely', 'text', ?, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_awards_night__ballots (id, ceremony_id, category_id, member_id, member_name, nominee_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('b_a', 'cer1', 'cat1', ?, 'A', 'First Pick', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z')
UPDATE app_awards_night__ceremonies SET status = 'revealed', revealed_at = '2026-01-03T00:00:00Z' WHERE id = 'cer1'

INSERT INTO app_awards_night__ballots (id, ceremony_id, category_id, member_id, member_name, nominee_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('b_b', 'cer1', 'cat1', ?, 'B', 'Late Pick', '2026-01-04T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-04T00:00:00Z')
UPDATE app_awards_night__ballots SET nominee_name = 'Changed My Mind' WHERE id = 'b_a'
SELECT nominee_name FROM app_awards_night__ballots WHERE id = 'b_a'
